description: LinkParaP (bold=on, sz=24) linked to LinkCharP (strike=on). MidPara basedOn LinkParaP (italic=on). GrandPara basedOn MidPara (color=FF0000). Tests that linked overlay does NOT leak into child styles via basedOn chain.

expected.para_2: bold=on, sz=24, italic=on. NO strike (link doesn't leak)
expected.para_3: bold=on, sz=24, italic=on, color=FF0000. NO strike
